title: Cape Coast Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Cape Coast, with a Z-Score of +3.49. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Cape Coast is characterized by high temperatures and high humidity, with an Umidita of 74%. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with a CDD of 11.2 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The Vento of 15.8 km/h may provide some relief, but the overall conditions are still critical, with a Level of CRITICAL and HDD of 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
